user_story: As an Announcement Coordinator, I want to add a new announcement, so that I can communicate news to employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Announcement screen; When I click Add new announcement and complete the details; Then the announcement is created and appears in the list

user_story: As an Announcement Coordinator, I want to search announcements by period and status, so that I can quickly find relevant announcements
acceptance_criteria: Given announcements exist; When I set a From/To period and a Status and click Search; Then only matching announcements are listed

user_story: As an Announcement Coordinator, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can start a new search from a clean state
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period and status filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full announcement list is shown

user_story: As an Announcement Coordinator, I want to filter announcements by workflow status such as Pending approval, Approved, Published or Rejected, so that I can track each announcement through its lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: Given announcements in various states; When I select a Status such as Pending approval or Published; Then the list shows only announcements in that state

user_story: As an employee, I want announcements to be visible to my location and show start/end dates and type, so that I only see relevant and current communications
acceptance_criteria: Given a published announcement targeted to my location; When I view the announcement list; Then I see its title, type, event basis, dates, visible locations and status

user_story: As an Announcement Coordinator, I want to create recurring event-based announcements such as birthdays and service anniversaries, so that greetings are sent automatically each year
acceptance_criteria: Given I add an announcement of type Recurring based on Date of Birth or Service Anniversary; When I save it; Then it is listed as a recurring event-based announcement
